mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO cashflow (ts_code, ann_date, f_ann_date, end_date, report_type, comp_type, n_cashflow_act, n_cashflow_inv_act, n_cash_flows_fnc_act, free_cashflow, c_fr_sale_sg, c_fr_oth_sg, c_paid_goods_s, c_paid_to_for_empl, c_paid_for_taxes, c_paid_oth_op_f, c_paid_invest, c_paid_invest_f, c_pay_acq_const_fiolta, c_pay_acq_int_long_loan, disp_fix_assets_oth, n_invest_loss, c_fr_fnc_loan, c_fr_fnc_oth, proceeds_long_loan, c_paid_fin_fees, c_pay_dist_dpcp_int_exp, end_bal_cash, beg_bal_cash, n_cash_equ, n_increase_incl_child, prov_depr_assets, depr_fa_coga_dpba, amort_intang, amort_lt_deferred_exp, loss_disp_fa, loss_scr_fa, loss_fair_valu, fin_exp, loss_inv, dec_def_inc_tax_assets, inc_def_inc_tax_liab, dec_inv, dec_oper_rece, inc_oper_payable, net_profit, minority_interest, undistributed_profit_in, update_flag ) VALUES
(#{i.tsCode}, #{i.annDate}, #{i.fAnnDate}, #{i.endDate}, #{i.reportType}, #{i.compType}, #{i.nCashflowAct}, #{i.nCashflowInvAct}, #{i.nCashFlowsFncAct}, #{i.freeCashflow}, #{i.cFrSaleSg}, #{i.cFrOthSg}, #{i.cPaidGoodsS}, #{i.cPaidToForEmpl}, #{i.cPaidForTaxes}, #{i.cPaidOthOpF}, #{i.cPaidInvest}, #{i.cPaidInvestF}, #{i.cPayAcqConstFiolta}, #{i.cPayAcqIntLongLoan}, #{i.dispFixAssetsOth}, #{i.nInvestLoss}, #{i.cFrFncLoan}, #{i.cFrFncOth}, #{i.proceedsLongLoan}, #{i.cPaidFinFees}, #{i.cPayDistDpcpIntExp}, #{i.endBalCash}, #{i.begBalCash}, #{i.nCashEqu}, #{i.nIncreaseInclChild}, #{i.provDeprAssets}, #{i.deprFaCogaDpba}, #{i.amortIntang}, #{i.amortLtDeferredExp}, #{i.lossDispFa}, #{i.lossScrFa}, #{i.lossFairValu}, #{i.finExp}, #{i.lossInv}, #{i.decDefIncTaxAssets}, #{i.incDefIncTaxLiab}, #{i.decInv}, #{i.decOperRece}, #{i.incOperPayable}, #{i.netProfit}, #{i.minorityInterest}, #{i.undistributedProfitIn}, #{i.updateFlag} )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM cashflow WHERE (ts_code, end_date, report_type) IN
(#{i.tsCode}, #{i.endDate}, #{i.reportType})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cashflow WHERE ts_code = #{tsCode} AND ann_date IS NOT NULL AND ann_date != '' AND ann_date <= #{tradeDate} AND report_type = '1' ORDER BY end_date DESC LIMIT 1
